docs.title: Cell Line Repository
docs.text: This site collects culture conditions, handling notes, QC expectations, and references for commonly used cell lines.

docs.title: Principles
docs.text:
• Don’t invent parameters. Mark unknowns as Unknown.
  • Prefer authoritative sources (ATCC/DSMZ/JCRB/ECACC, RRID, peer-reviewed papers).
  • Content is informational; follow institutional SOPs and vendor datasheets.

Use the left navigation to browse cell lines.

docs.title: Schema (v1)
docs.text: Each cell line page should include the sections below (use the same headings for consistency).

docs.title: 1. At-a-glance
docs.text: • Name, RRID, species, tissue, growth mode, recommended medium, BSL

docs.title: 2. Identity & provenance
docs.text: • Provider/catalog, aliases, origin, derivation

docs.title: 3. Culture conditions
docs.text:
• Base medium
  • Supplements (with final concentrations when sourced)
  • Environment (temperature/CO₂/O₂)
  • Coating (if required)

docs.title: 4. Passaging & routine maintenance
docs.text: • Dissociation method, split ratio, confluency guidance, media change cadence

docs.title: 5. Cryopreservation
docs.text: • Freezing medium, freezing density (if known), storage

docs.title: 6. QC
docs.text: • Authentication guidance, mycoplasma testing, other notes

docs.title: 7. Characteristics
docs.text: • Morphology, doubling time (with conditions), notable phenotypes

docs.title: 8. References
docs.text: • Vendor page + RRID + key papers

docs.title: 9. Data needed
docs.text: • Unknown or conflicting items to resolve with better sources

docs.title: At-a-glance
docs.text:
• Name: HEK293
  • RRID: CVCL_0045
  • Species: Homo sapiens
  • Origin: Kidney (embryonic), immortalized/transformed line
  • Growth mode: Adherent (typically)
  • Recommended medium: Unknown (commonly DMEM + serum; confirm from provider)
  • Biosafety: Unknown (confirm via provider/institutional guidance)

docs.title: Identity & provenance
docs.text:
• Aliases: 293
  • Provider/catalog: Unknown (add ATCC/other catalog + link)
  • Derivation: Unknown (add citation)

docs.title: Culture conditions
docs.text:
• Base medium: Unknown
  • Supplements (final concentrations):
  • FBS: Unknown
  • L-glutamine/GlutaMAX: Unknown
  • Pen/Strep: Optional; unknown
  • Environment: 37°C; CO₂ typically 5% (confirm); O₂ ambient unless otherwise required
  • Coating: Unknown (often not required; confirm)

docs.title: Passaging & routine maintenance
docs.text:
• Dissociation: Unknown (commonly trypsin-EDTA; confirm)
  • Split ratio: Unknown
  • Passage when: Unknown (often 70–90% confluent; confirm)
  • Media change cadence: Unknown (often every 2–3 days; confirm)

docs.title: Thawing & recovery notes
docs.text:
• Thaw quickly, dilute DMSO promptly, seed into pre-warmed complete medium.
  • First media change timing: Unknown

docs.title: Cryopreservation (high-level)
docs.text:
• Freezing medium: Unknown (commonly complete medium + ~10% DMSO; confirm)
  • Cells per vial: Unknown
  • Storage: LN₂ vapor phase recommended

docs.title: Growth characteristics & morphology
docs.text:
• Morphology: Epithelial-like adherent monolayer (confirm)
  • Doubling time: Unknown (report with conditions)

docs.title: Genetic/molecular features
docs.text: • Key features/mutations: Unknown (only add with citations)

docs.title: Quality control
docs.text:
• Authentication: STR profiling recommended (human lines). Record date and lab.
  • Mycoplasma: Test upon receipt, before banking, and periodically.

docs.title: Applications, limitations, and tips
docs.text:
• Commonly used for transfection/protein expression (confirm with references)
  • Track passage number to reduce drift.

docs.title: References
docs.text:
• RRID listing/search: https://scicrunch.org/resources (search CVCL_0045)
  • Provider page: Unknown

docs.title: Data needed
docs.text:
• Confirm provider/cat # (ATCC/other)
  • Confirm recommended medium + serum %
  • Confirm BSL classification
  • Doubling time under stated conditions

docs.title: At-a-glance
docs.text:
• Name: RAW 264.7
  • RRID: CVCL_0493
  • Species: Mus musculus
  • Origin: Macrophage-like cell line (mouse)
  • Growth mode: Adherent / semi-adherent
  • Recommended medium: Unknown (commonly DMEM + serum; confirm from provider)
  • Biosafety: Unknown (confirm via provider/institutional guidance)

docs.title: Identity & provenance
docs.text:
• Aliases: RAW264.7
  • Provider/catalog: Unknown (add ATCC/other catalog + link)
  • Cell type: Macrophage-like
  • Disease/derivation: Unknown (add citation)

docs.title: Culture conditions
docs.text:
• Base medium: Unknown
  • Supplements:
  • FBS: Unknown
  • L-glutamine/GlutaMAX: Unknown
  • Pen/Strep: Optional; unknown
  • Environment: 37°C; CO₂ typically 5% (confirm)
  • Coating: Unknown (often not required; confirm)

docs.title: Passaging & routine maintenance
docs.text:
• Dissociation: Unknown (often gentle dissociation/scraping is used; confirm + cite)
  • Split ratio: Unknown
  • Passage when: Unknown
  • Media change cadence: Unknown

docs.title: Thawing & recovery notes
docs.text:
• Thaw quickly, dilute DMSO promptly, seed at sufficient density to recover.
  • RAW 264.7 phenotype can shift with conditions—document what you use.

docs.title: Cryopreservation (high-level)
docs.text:
• Freezing medium: Unknown (commonly complete medium + ~10% DMSO; confirm)
  • Cells per vial: Unknown
  • Storage: LN₂ vapor phase recommended

docs.title: Growth characteristics & morphology
docs.text:
• Morphology: Macrophage-like; adherent cells, can cluster (confirm)
  • Doubling time: Unknown (report with conditions)

docs.title: Genetic/molecular features
docs.text: • Key markers/features: Unknown (only add with citations)

docs.title: Quality control
docs.text:
• Authentication: Species confirmation recommended; record provider lot details.
  • Mycoplasma: Test upon receipt, before banking, periodically.

docs.title: Applications, limitations, and tips
docs.text:
• Commonly used for macrophage activation/inflammation assays (confirm with references)
  • Passage number and density can affect responses—track carefully.

docs.title: References
docs.text:
• RRID listing/search: https://scicrunch.org/resources (search CVCL_0493)
  • Provider page: Unknown

docs.title: Data needed
docs.text:
• Confirm provider/cat # (ATCC/other)
  • Confirm recommended medium + serum %
  • Confirm best passaging approach (trypsin vs scraping) with a citation
  • Confirm BSL classification
  • Doubling time under stated conditions
